column3: "Licorice lowers blood sugar levels" refers to its effect on regulating glucose in the body, which can help manage diabetes and improve insulin sensitivity.
"Licorice reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its ability to calm the mind and body by regulating hormones responsible for such conditions, making it a possible herbal remedy.
"Licorice boosts heart health" refers to its ability to improve cardiovascular system function due to its antioxidant properties and other beneficial compounds.
"Licorice promotes weight loss" refers to its potential effect of aiding in slimming down or losing excess body fat, possibly through metabolic changes and appetite suppression.
"Licorice supports liver function" refers to its ability to potentially improve and enhance the liver's overall health and performance.

"Licorice improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance the process of breaking down food, making it easier for the body to absorb nutrients and reducing discomfort related to indigestion or upset stomach.

"Licorice relieves joint pain" refers to its ability of acting as a natural remedy for easing discomfort and inflammation linked to issues with bones, tendons, and cartilages connecting them in our body's joint system.
"Licorice enhances immune system" refers to its ability to improve body's defense mechanism by supporting and strengthening immune responses.
"Licorice fights inflammation" refers to its ability to reduce swelling and pain caused by irritation or injury, often used for healing purposes due to its anti-inflammatory properties.

column2: Reduces bad breath and body odor
column3: "Licorice reduces bad breath and body odor" refers to its ability to eliminate unpleasant smells caused by oral bacteria, enhancing freshness in both mouth and overall body scent.
